channel.title: GitHub Makefile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification
item.description: Specifications for OpenTelemetry

item.title: ailabstw/social-distancing
item.description: A simple, decentralized. privacy-reserving contact tracing system

item.title: Sitoi/dailycheckin
item.description: 可基于【腾讯云函数】/【Docker】的每日签到脚本（支持多账号使用）签到列表: ｜爱奇艺｜全民K歌｜腾讯视频｜有道云笔记｜网易云音乐｜一加手机社区官方论坛｜百度贴吧｜Bilibili｜V2EX｜咔叽网单｜什么值得买｜AcFun｜天翼云盘｜WPS｜吾爱破解｜芒果TV｜联通营业厅｜Fa米家｜喜马拉雅极速版｜小米运动｜百度搜索资源平台｜每日天气预报｜每日一句｜哔咔漫画｜

item.title: openwrt/packages
item.description: Community maintained packages for OpenWrt. Documentation for submitting pull requests is in CONTRIBUTING.md

item.title: theos/theos
item.description: A cross-platform suite of tools for building and deploying software for iOS and other platforms.

item.title: NVIDIA/nvidia-docker
item.description: Build and run Docker containers leveraging NVIDIA GPUs

item.title: 351ELEC/351ELEC
item.description: Handheld firmware optimized for the Anbernic RG351P/M/V devices.

item.title: kuoruan/openwrt-v2ray
item.description: V2Ray for OpenWrt

item.title: ehn-dcc-development/ehn-dcc-schema
item.description: Schema for the ehn DCC payload

item.title: MechanicalDragon0687/TWLFix-CFW
item.description: Uninstall the stock TWL apps, to allow system to reinstall them from CDN

item.title: yuk7/ArchWSL
item.description: ArchLinux based WSL Distribution. Supports multiple install.

item.title: SynoCommunity/spksrc
item.description: Cross compilation framework to create native packages for the Synology's NAS

item.title: olxbr/kafka-manager
item.description: Dockerized kafka-manager

item.title: Naereen/badges
item.description: 📝 Markdown code for lots of small badges 🎀 📌 (shields.io, forthebadge.com etc) 😎. Contributions are welcome! Please add yours!

item.title: unpoller/unpoller
item.description: Application: Collect ALL UniFi Controller, Site, Device & Client Data - Export to InfluxDB or Prometheus

item.title: hortonworks/docker-haveged
item.description: Haveged container to increase entropy

item.title: redox-os/redox
item.description: Mirror of https://gitlab.redox-os.org/redox-os/redox

item.title: golang-standards/project-layout
item.description: Standard Go Project Layout

item.title: PostgresApp/PostgresApp
item.description: The easiest way to get started with PostgreSQL on the Mac

item.title: foostan/crkbd
item.description: Corne keyboard, a split keyboard with 3x6 column staggered keys and 3 thumb keys.

item.title: peng-zhihui/SerialChart
item.description: 一个很好用的串口示波器。

item.title: WerWolv/Tesla-Menu
item.description: The Nintendo Switch overlay menu
